deals.notes: Mobile Eats has substrate evidence but no signed owner-operator, cap-table, distribution terms, or legal review refs, so owner economics cannot clear.

notes: This ledger is the mechanical gate for the holding-company owner-operator economics promise.
A deal clears only when signed or active terms prove 25% owner equity and tiered 45-75% owner profit distributions.
This is a receipt gate, not legal or tax advice.
next_action: Before counting a company as deal-clear, add signed owner-operator, cap-table, distribution terms, legal review, and substrate-share receipts proving 25% owner equity and 45-75% tiered distributions.
